hypothesis: A conditional variational autoencoder trained on Li–Si–X crystal graphs and conditioned on the presence of Si and Li, target capacity >1500 mAh/g, and large Li-channel radius can generate novel silicon-containing LixSiyXz compounds that, after simulated delithiation/lithiation relaxations, retain large Li+ migration channels, maintain capacities above 1500 mAh/g, and exhibit structural stability with mean energy per atom variation below 4%.
